name: Chile
contextBlurb: Chile does not yet have a dedicated legal framework for stablecoins or digital assets. The Comisión para el Mercado Financiero (CMF) has studied crypto regulation and proposed a fintech law, but specific stablecoin rules remain undefined. Crypto assets are generally treated as commodities for tax purposes.

stablecoinMeta.summaryEn: Chile does not yet have a dedicated legal framework for stablecoins or digital assets. The CMF has studied crypto regulation but specific stablecoin rules remain undefined. Crypto assets are generally treated as commodities for tax purposes.

regulators.name: Comisión para el Mercado Financiero
regulators.role: Financial market regulator. Has studied crypto regulation and is expected to develop a fintech and digital assets framework, though no specific stablecoin rules exist yet.
